# cloudtemple_vpc_vpcs (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all VPCs.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read all VPCs
data "cloudtemple_vpc_vpcs" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `vpcs` (List of Object) The list of VPCs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vpcs))

<a id="nestedatt--vpcs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vpcs`

Read-Only:

- `floating_ip_count` (Number)
- `id` (String)
- `internet_ip` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `private_network_count` (Number)
- `static_ip_count` (Number)
